creator: imp@FreeBSD.org
text:
When you boot under 7.2 with the hacked env, can you run "acpidump -t" and report what the SPCR table looks like, should be something like:

/*
  SPCR: Length=80, Revision=2, Checksum=186,
	OEMID=A M I, OEM Table ID=APTIO V, OEM Revision=0x1072009,
	Creator ID=AMI., Creator Revision=0x5000d
	InterfaceType=3 (Arm PL011 UART)
	SerialPort=0x0000000012600000:0[32] (Memory)
	InterruptType=0x8 (ARMH GIC)
	PcInterrupt=98 (Invalid)
	Interrupt=98
	BaudRate=115200 (7)
	Parity=0
	StopBits=1
	FlowControl=0
	TerminalType=2 (VT-UTF8)
	PciDeviceId=0xffff
	PciVendorId=0xffff
	PciBus=0
	PciDevice=0
	PciFunction=0
	PciFlags=0
	PciSegment=0
 */
